collectionProcessors.name: targetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetInsulationCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetInsulationCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetOtherCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetOtherCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetRebarCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetRebarCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

collectionProcessors.name: targetStructuralCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.label: targetStructuralCollection_caseO
collectionProcessors.conditionLogic: 1 OR 2 OR 3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6 OR (7 AND 8)

formulas.name: gypsumBoardProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetGypsumBoardCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: insulationProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetInsulationCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: LightGaugeSteelProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetLightGaugeSteelCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: otherProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetOtherCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: readyMixedConcreteProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetReadyMixedConcreteCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: rebarProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetRebarCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

formulas.name: structuralProposalResult
formulas.expression: IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseSaiyou} > 0, "採用済", IF( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseO} > 0, "O", IF( AND( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseX} > 0, {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseO} = 0 ), "X", /* 以降の IF 文、20250127時点で意味がないが、要求仕様にのっとり記述 */ IF( AND( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseX} = 0, {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseO} = 0, {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseSaiyou} = 0, OR( {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseNull} = 0, {!counterTargetStructuralCollection_caseNull} > 0 ) ), NULL, NULL ) ) ) )

Flow.label: 【提案商品/取引先】6カテ商品提案状況記録
